site.name: Matryo Finance
site.tagline: Every layer compounds. Every dollar works.
hero.subtitle: The tri-layer stablecoin protocol. RWA yields × CeFi strategies × DeFi composability — nested like a Matryoshka.
problem.title: Stablecoins were never meant to
problem.brokenModelDesc: Currently, stablecoin issuers like Tether capture $6B+ annually from reserves. USDC yields nothing to everyday holders. User deposits generate billions in yield, but those returns go exclusively to centralized corporations.
problem.solutionDesc: We flip the model. Matryo passes 80% of the generated yield back to token holders. By stacking RWA foundation yields, CeFi basis trading, and DeFi composability, we create a stablecoin that actively works for you.
matryoshka.title: Three layers. One dollar.
matryoshka.subtitle: Hover over the layers to see how Matryo stacks yields from different sources into a single, cohesive stablecoin.
matryoshka.defiDesc: Pendle YT/PT positions, Curve LPs, and Morpho Vaults. The high-yield compounding layer.
matryoshka.cefiDesc: Delta-neutral basis trading and funding rate arbitrage on top centralized exchanges.
matryoshka.rwaDesc: US T-Bills, overcollateralized money markets, and AA-Grade corporate bonds.

redemption.emergencyGuardDesc: In the event of extreme market volatility, instant redemptions are guaranteed up to $5M per user per day from the protocol insurance fund.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Matryo Finance protocol and how it works.
faq.a1: Matryo Finance is a tri-layer stablecoin protocol that combines RWA yields, CeFi strategies, and DeFi composability into a single yield-bearing stablecoin (mUSD). Like a Matryoshka doll, each layer nests within the next, compounding returns at every level.
faq.a2: mUSD is a stablecoin pegged 1:1 to USD, minted by depositing USDT, USDC, or other supported assets. It represents your position in the Matryo protocol. When staked as smUSD, it automatically earns yield from the tri-layer strategy.
faq.a3: smUSD (staked mUSD) is the yield-bearing version of mUSD. When you stake mUSD, you receive smUSD which appreciates in value over time as the protocol generates yield across all three layers. The smUSD/mUSD exchange rate continuously increases.
faq.q4: How does the tri-layer yield work?
faq.a4: Layer 1 (RWA Foundation): US Treasury Bills and money market funds provide a stable base yield of 3-5%. Layer 2 (CeFi Core): Delta-neutral strategies like basis trading and funding rate arbitrage add 2-4%. Layer 3 (DeFi Shell): LP positions, yield farming, and Pendle integrations can add another 2-5%. Combined, users typically see 8-12% APY.
faq.a5: 80% of all protocol revenue goes directly to smUSD holders through daily auto-compounding. 10% goes to the protocol treasury as a risk reserve and insurance fund. The remaining 10% supports development, operations, and governance incentives.
faq.q6: Can I redeem mUSD at any time?
faq.a6: mUSD can be redeemed 1:1 for USDC/USDT at any time. smUSD requires a 7-day cooldown period for unstaking. We also offer a "slow redemption" option: if you choose to wait 30 days, you receive bonus interest on top of your normal yield.
faq.a7: Matryoshka Points are earned by holding mUSD/smUSD, providing liquidity, and engaging with the protocol. Points can be used for future airdrops, yield boosts, governance voting, VIP strategy access, and exclusive NFT badges. Points are updated weekly.
faq.a8: Assets are distributed across multiple protocols with multi-sig control and full on-chain transparency. The 10% treasury reserve acts as an insurance fund against extreme scenarios. All collateral is verifiable on-chain, and the protocol undergoes regular security audits.
cta.title: Start earning with
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users compounding their stablecoins across RWA, CeFi, and DeFi.
app.mintRedeem.stableNote: 1 USDC = 1 mUSD. No slippage for stablecoin minting.
app.mintRedeem.volatileNote: Over-collateralized at 150%. Subject to liquidation if ratio drops below 110%.
app.mintRedeem.connectWalletDesc: You need to connect your wallet to perform this action.
app.stake.title: Stake mUSD
app.stake.cooldownDesc: Unstaked mUSD will be available to claim after the cooldown period ends.
app.stake.howSmusdWorksDesc: smUSD is a yield-bearing token that represents your staked mUSD. The exchange rate between smUSD and mUSD grows over time as the protocol earns yield from its multi-layered strategies. You don't need to claim yield manually — holding smUSD is all you need to do.
app.earn.title: Earn Strategies
app.earn.subtitle: Matryo Finance aggregates yield across multiple layers of risk and complexity to deliver a sustainable blended APY for smUSD holders.
app.earn.rwaDesc: US Treasury Bills, money market funds, and AA-grade sovereign bonds provide the stable base layer of returns.
app.earn.cefiDesc: Delta-neutral strategies including basis trading and funding rate arbitrage generate additional yield without directional risk.
app.earn.defiDesc: Stablecoin LPs, yield farming, and Pendle yield tokenization unlock the highest returns through DeFi composability.
app.earn.maximizeYieldDesc: By staking your mUSD, you gain exposure to all three layers of yield simultaneously.
app.transparency.title: Transparency Dashboard
app.transparency.subtitle: Real-time visibility into Matryo Finance's collateralization, yield sources, and protocol health.
app.points.title: Matryoshka Points
app.points.subtitle: Earn points for participating in the Matryo ecosystem. Points determine your rank, unlock exclusive rewards, and convert to future protocol tokens.
app.points.apyBoostDesc: Earn an extra 1% APY on all staked assets
app.points.vipAccessDesc: Exclusive access to high-yield Layer 3 vaults
